parameters.content:
## Founder Network Nurturer

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set NETWORK_EMAIL_TO (yourself)
3. Provide your contact list with last-contact dates and relationship notes
4. LLM identifies who to reach out to this week and drafts personalised outreach
5. Approval gate before any outreach is sent

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL REQUIRED: Network Nurturer — {{ $json.meta.outreach_count }} outreach draft{{ $json.meta.outreach_count !== 1 ? 's' : '' }} ready for review
parameters.message:
=
{{ $json.report_text }}

Review and personalise each draft before sending manually.
Mark as reviewed | Discard

assignments.name: note
assignments.value: Send outreach messages manually via LinkedIn/Email. Workflow records approval only — does not send messages automatically.
